Table Has_Pet with columns StuID (integer), PetID (integer) — foreign keys: StuID → Student(StuID), PetID → Pets(PetID)
Table Pets with columns PetID (integer), PetType (varchar(20)), pet_age (integer), weight (real)
Table Student with columns StuID (integer), LName (varchar(12)), Fname (varchar(12)), Age (integer), Sex (varchar(1)), Major (integer), Advisor (integer), city_code (varchar(3))
